## Which component does this affect?

- [ ] Webhook handler (`app/webhook_handler.py`)
- [ ] AI reviewer (`app/ai_reviewer.py`)
- [ ] GitHub client (`app/github_client.py`)
- [ ] Fine-tuning pipeline (`app/fine_tuner.py`, `app/data_collector.py`)
- [ ] Dashboard (`dashboard/index.html`)
- [ ] GitHub Actions workflows (`.github/workflows/`)
- [ ] Jupyter notebooks (`notebooks/`)
- [ ] Other
